summary: hello244a postinstall harvests credentials from host filesystem and exfiltrates to pipedream.net
details: The package's package.json postinstall lifecycle script writes a shell payload to /tmp/s.sh and executes it on `npm install`. The payload recursively greps /root, /home, /var/www, /opt, /srv, /app, and /etc for credential-shaped tokens (TOKEN, SECRET, PASSWORD, API_KEY, JWT, eyJ, AWS_), base64-encodes the matches, and POSTs them via wget --post-file to a hardcoded endpoint at https://eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net/. Installing this package on any machine (particularly build agents or containers running as root) results in immediate exfiltration of credentials found across common secret-bearing paths to an attacker-controlled Pipedream request-bin.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
